permits.description: Repair/replace elements of front porch, repair siding, add gutters and downspouts for better drainage away from house. Footings are new and will remain. Repair flashing details on roof. Interior work includes reworking ducts to better distribute HAVC on first floor. Include painting as needed.
permits.score_reasons: moderate cost ($62,255); keyword: gut; minor: siding; permit completed; all permits completed

llm_assessment.reasoning: The permit work consists of maintenance and system repairs (porch, siding, gutters, HVAC) by an owner-occupant, which aligns with standard property upkeep rather than high-end pre-sale renovations.
